# AImpactScanner

> AImpactScanner is an AI search visibility analysis tool that scans any webpage against 27 factors across 8 pillars using the MASTERY-AI Framework v3.1.1. It shows exactly how AI search engines like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini see your site, with a prioritised action plan to improve visibility. Free tier available with no signup required.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://aimpactscanner.com/): Free AI search visibility scanner — enter any URL and get your score in 60 seconds
- [Pricing](https://aimpactscanner.com/#pricing): Free, Solo ($9.95/mo), Growth ($19.95/mo), and Scale ($39.95/mo) plans
- [Methodology](https://aimpactscanner.com/#methodology): Full documentation of the MASTERY-AI Framework and all 27 scoring factors
- [How It Works](https://aimpactscanner.com/#how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of the scanning process
- [Sample Report](https://aimpactscanner.com/#sample-report): Example scan results showing the full 27-factor breakdown
- [FAQ](https://aimpactscanner.com/#faq): Frequently asked questions about AI search visibility
- [About](https://aimpactscanner.com/#about): About AI Search Mastery and the team behind AImpactScanner

## MASTERY-AI Framework v3.1.1

The scanner evaluates 27 factors across 8 pillars:

- **AI Readiness** (4 factors): How prepared your content is for AI consumption
- **Authority** (3 factors): Trust signals and credibility indicators
- **Machine Readability** (4 factors): Technical accessibility for AI crawlers
- **Semantic Structure** (3 factors): Content organisation and meaning
- **Engagement** (3 factors): User interaction and content quality signals
- **Technical** (4 factors): Site performance and infrastructure
- **Reference** (3 factors): Citations, links, and external validation
- **Yield** (3 factors): Conversion and business outcome indicators

## Pricing

- **Free**: $0/forever — 3 scans/month, overall score, top 3 gaps
- **Solo**: $9.95/month — 10 scans, full 27-factor breakdown, PDF reports, historical tracking
- **Growth**: $19.95/month — 40 scans, LLM.txt Mastery included, remediation planner, competitive benchmarking
- **Scale**: $39.95/month — 100 scans, API access, white-label reports, team collaboration

## Part of AI Search Mastery

AImpactScanner is part of the AI Search Mastery product suite:

- [AI Search Mastery](https://aisearchmastery.com): AI search optimization platform and knowledge hub
- [LLM.txt Mastery](https://llmtxtmastery.com): Generate and validate llms.txt files for AI discoverability
- [AI Search Arena](https://aisearcharena.com): Benchmark and compare AI search optimization tools
